title: Ask HN: Anyone here bought an abandoned mobile app? What was the process?
summary: High-engagement HN thread on app acquisition. Multiple founders sharing deals: 2-4x revenue multiples, direct outreach to devs. Several commenters mention buying apps for $500–$15K. Strong buyer intent signal.

title: Peec, one of Berlin’s rising startups, more than doubled annualized revenue in months to $10M, sources say
summary: Peec, which helps brands track their presence in AI searches, offers proof of a key trend among European startups.

title: SpaceX launches Starship V3 for the first time, but loses booster on return
summary: The company had a mostly successful first launch of its upgraded Starship V3, which it needs to power its many ambitious goals in the years to come.

title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
summary: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.

title: Apple says Epic lawsuit shouldn’t reshape App Store rules for all developers
summary: Apple is asking the Supreme Court to narrow the App Store injunction won by Epic Games and overturn the court’s contempt ruling over external payment fees.

title: The FBI Wants ‘Near Real-Time’ Access to US License Plate Readers
summary: Plus: Google publishes a live exploit for an unpatched flaw, the feds arrest two men accused of creating thousands of nonconsensual deepfake nudes, and more.

title: All Vehicles Sold in the EU Must Be Able to Hook Up to a Breathalyzer
summary: The measure is part of a European Union–led strategy to eliminate all drunk-driving-related deaths and injuries by 2050.

title: Shein Buying Everlane Actually Makes Perfect Sense
summary: The acquisition struck many people as a bizarre mismatch, but it's really a sign of where Chinese ecommerce giants are already going.

title: Selling my PDF scanner app — 48K MAU, $340/mo revenue, built 3 years ago [r/SideProject]
summary: Developer selling PDF scanner app with 48K monthly active users and $340/mo ad revenue. Asking 2.5x annual. Android only, built in Java. No broker involved — direct deal possible.

title: Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot ‘personalities’
summary: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on AI mischief, follow Robert Hart. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Hacking the first generation of A

title: Peacock Promo Codes: 40% Off May 2026
summary: Stream your favorite shows for up to $80 off this month, and save on subscription plans with the latest Peacock TV coupons from WIRED.

title: Show HN: I turned an abandoned habit tracker into $6K/mo in 4 months
summary: Founder acquired an abandoned habit tracker app for $2,800, relaunched with a paywall, hit $6K/mo in 4 months. Thread details the acquisition process, negotiation, and growth tactics. Strong signal for the acquire+rebuild playbook.

title: My meditation app hit 900K downloads then I stopped updating it 18 months ago. AMA [r/androiddev]
summary: Developer of a 900K-download meditation app doing an AMA about abandoning it. Mentioned he's open to selling. App still gets ~12K downloads/month organically. No asking price stated — classic Partner or Acquire opportunity.

title: AppFlip — Marketplace for buying and selling bootstrapped mobile apps
summary: New marketplace specifically for mobile app acquisitions launching. 127 upvotes, strong community interest. Confirms growing demand for off-market app deals. Competitive signal — move on pipeline now before more buyers enter the market.

title: The graveyard economy: how solo devs are selling apps they can no longer maintain
summary: Long-form analysis of the growing market for abandoned apps. Author interviewed 14 solo developers who sold their apps. Average sale price: $3,200. Most said they would have accepted less if someone had reached out earlier. Key insight: 90% of sellers preferred direct outreach over brokers.
